meta.title: Clarium — Simple finances. Clear life.
meta.description: Minimalist finance app, 100% free, offline and local. Control your finances with clarity, without complexity.
meta.ogTitle: Clarium — Organize your finances with clarity

hero.headline: Simple finances.
hero.subheadline: No more confusing dashboards. Clarium gives you real financial control — direct, clean, and smart.

about.headline:
Financial organization
for real people.
about.body: Clarium is a personal finance app built on a simple premise: anyone should be able to organize their finances without becoming an analyst. No complicated spreadsheets, no hidden menus, no subscriptions.
about.body2: A straight-to-the-point app. For everyday life.

problem.headline:
Financial apps are
too complex.
problemItems: Dashboards full of charts nobody uses
Forced to link a bank account
solutionItems: Everything in at most two taps
Your data stays on your phone

features.headline:
Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

items.title: Income & expenses
items.description: Log entries and expenses quickly. History always accessible.

items.title: Recurring items
items.description: Fixed bills and subscriptions registered once, always controlled.

items.title: Custom categories
items.description: Organize your way. Your categories, your logic.

items.title: 100% offline
items.description: No internet, no servers. Works wherever you are.

items.title: Local data
items.description: Your data stays on your device. Nobody else accesses it.

items.title: Multilingual
items.description: Available in Portuguese, English and Spanish.

demo.headline: Clean by design.
demo.body: Every screen was designed to reduce friction. Right information, at the right time, in the right place.

howMade.headline:
Built with care,
not with shortcuts.
howMade.body: Every design and code decision was made with a focus on real usability and consistent performance. Clean architecture, reusable components, UX validated in practice.

pillars.title: UX-first
pillars.desc: Interface validated with real users before any new feature.

pillars.title: Performance
pillars.desc: Lightweight screens, smooth navigation, instant response even offline.

pillars.title: Clean code
pillars.desc: Scalable and maintainable architecture for continuous evolution.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.desc: Zero data transmission. Everything stays on your device.

items.name: Kotlin
items.desc: Modern and safe native Android language

support.headline:
Help Clarium
keep evolving.
support.body: Clarium is an independent project, built with real dedication. If it helped you, consider supporting it with any amount via Pix. Every contribution funds new improvements and maintenance.
support.disclaimer: 100% voluntary support. The app will remain free regardless.

author.headline:
Developed by
Carlos Gabriel.
author.body: Independent Android developer passionate about well-crafted interfaces and software that actually works. Clarium is a personal product project, not a template.
author.antifraud: Warning: the only official channels for Clarium and its author are those listed here. Be wary of any copy, clone or unofficial version of the app.

contact.headline: Let's talk.
contact.body: Have feedback, found a bug, have a suggestion or want to hire? Any channel below works.

items.a: Yes. 100% free, no ads, no subscription, no paywall. Always.
Completely. Clarium was built to work offline. No connection needed for anything.

items.q: Where does my financial data stay?
items.a: On your phone, and only there. The app has no server, no cloud backup, sends nothing anywhere. Your data is yours.

items.q: Is it safe to install an APK outside the Play Store?
items.a: Yes, as long as you download from the official link on this page. The APK is signed by the author and can be verified. Be wary of other sources.

items.q: How do I download the APK?
items.a: Click the download button at the top of this page. The APK file will download directly to your Android device.

items.q: Will the project keep receiving updates?
items.a: Yes. Clarium is a continuously evolving project. New versions with improvements are released regularly.

items.q: How can I support the project?
items.a: Via Pix, in the support section of this page. Any amount is welcome and goes directly to development.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Via LinkedIn, email or GitHub. All official channels are in the contact section and footer of this page.

footer.officialNotice: The official channels of Clarium are exclusively those listed on this page.
footer.independentNote: Independent project · No affiliation with financial companies
